case_title: A-TOTAL FIRE PROTECTION COMPANY INC. VS. LEE WESTERN COMPANY LLC

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $795.00 FILED BY A-TOTAL FIRE PROTECTION COMPANY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE WESTERN COMPANY LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/7/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$110.00) SERVED AUG-03-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE WESTERN COMPANY LLC
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR: DENISE MCADAM TO APPEAR FOR PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-TOTAL FIRE PROTECTION COMPANY INC.
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
